data.title: Riot Platforms, a Bitcoin miner, sold $250M worth of BTC as it shifts focus to AI, signaling a strategic move.
data.description: Riot Platforms, a publicly traded Bitcoin mining company, recently sold an additional $250 million worth of Bitcoin. This strategic move is part of their shift towards focusing on artificial intelligence (AI) technology.

data.title: At WMF a new edition of AI Global Summit, an international reference point on Artificial Intelligence
data.description: The AI Global Summit is set to take place during the WMF 2026, serving as a platform for collaboration among companies, institutions, and researchers to delve into the realms of AI scenarios, applications, and governance. Prominent industry players including NVIDIA, Anthropic, and OpenAI have confirmed their participation. The event will be held in Bologna, Italy on April 3, 2026.

Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of United Bank

data.title: Uncertainty and caution apparent in new tech employment data, CompTIA analysis finds
data.description: In March, employers in the tech sector reduced their workforce while ramping up job postings for new hires. This trend was reported in Downers Grove, Illinois, on April 3, 2026. The tech employment market remained volatile, with analysis by CompTIA indicating fluctuations. The number of tech workers decreased, contrasting with the surge in job listings for potential recruits. This inconsistency has been ongoing for several months, reflecting the challenging landscape in the technology industry.

data.title: Geronimo Power Announces Start of Operations in Ohio at Dodson Creek Solar Project
data.description: Geronimo Power has officially commenced commercial operations at the Dodson Creek Solar Project in Highland County, Ohio, within the PJM market. This project, with a capacity of 117 MW, marks a significant milestone for Geronimo Power. The location in Highland County strategically places the project in a key area for maximizing energy generation.

data.title: Fast-Acting Covalent Protein Drugs From a New High-Throughput Platform
data.description: In Hangzhou, China, on April 3, 2026, a group of researchers led by Bobo Dang and Ting Zhou from Westlake University/Westlake Laboratory shared a study in Science detailing a novel method for developing rapid covalent protein therapeutics. Their research, "A...," showcases a high-throughput platform for this purpose.

data.title: PixVerse Updates R1 Real-time World Model with Shared Worlds and Personalized Avatars
data.description: PixVerse revealed a significant advancement in its real-time world model, R1. Introduced in January 2026 as the pioneering real-time world model globally, R1 transformed video content from static to interactive, allowing instant response to user interactions. The recent update enhances this concept further by enabling users to generate a digital version of themselves, incorporate it into the newly produced world, and live-share this experience with others in real time.

data.title: Predictions for 4/3: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK. Analysts foresee BTC may break $60,000 support level.
data.description: Some analysts argue that Bitcoin is in the process of establishing a support level, though others predict that the current decline may continue and potentially breach the $60,000 mark.

data.title: Anti-union advocates cheer setbacks at Wells Fargo
data.description: Supporters of right-to-work policies are hailing the recent defeats of unions at Wells Fargo as a signal that the surge in interest for organized labor during the Biden administration has come to an end.

data.title: Vancity reports strong 2025 performance. Asset levels reach a record $41 billion
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Vancouver, on the territories of Musqueam, Squamish, and Tsleil-Waututh Nations, Vancity announced its 2025 financial results. The report showcased robust profitability, revealing a historic milestone of $41 billion in assets alongside assets under administration. As the leading financial institution in British Columbia, Vancity is starting 2026 with a positive outlook, emphasizing sustained impact, expansion, and enhancing member experience.

data.title: Arctech Flagship SkyLine II: New Features Unlock Complex Solar Project Potential
data.description: In Kunshan, China, on April 3, 2026, the shift in photovoltaic development towards challenging terrains such as mountains, hills, and slopes is becoming more prevalent due to a shortage of premium land. Traditional tracking systems are encountering difficulties in adapting to such terrains, leading to increased site preparation costs and decreased efficiency.
